functions.name: deploy-conversation-memory-layer
functions.description: Deploy Conversation Memory Layer — configure tiered memory (short-term Redis, long-term Cosmos DB, episodic vector store), compression pipeline, PII-aware storage, recall API. Use when: deploy, provision memory.

functions.name: evaluate-conversation-memory-layer
functions.description: Evaluate Conversation Memory — measure recall accuracy, compression quality, PII scrubbing, memory relevance over time, storage efficiency. Use when: evaluate, test memory quality.

functions.name: tune-conversation-memory-layer
functions.description: Tune Conversation Memory — optimize compression ratio, recall thresholds, memory TTL per tier, embedding model for recall, storage cost per user. Use when: tune, optimize memory.
